breakdown: This PR refactors XP extraction logic by replacing `_extract_xp_from_player_data` with `extract_character_xp` and modifying reward synthesis to prioritize `xp_awarded` from combat/encounter summaries. The main changes are functional redirects and priority ordering in reward boxes, plus a rename from `check_and_set_level_up_pending_impl` to `ensure_level_up_rewards_pending`. Limited visibility into full codebase prevents complete assessment of type safety and architecture impacts.
key_changes: Replace `_extract_xp_from_player_data` calls with `extract_character_xp` across multiple locations
Modify `_synthesize_generic_rewards_box` to check `xp_awarded` from combat/encounter summary first before fallback to rewards_pending
Add type checking `isinstance(combat_summary, dict)` before accessing nested fields
Change function reference from `check_and_set_level_up_pending_impl` to `ensure_level_up_rewards_pending` in wrapper
Tests exist for edge cases (missing XP, invalid type, float conversion) but new code paths not fully exercised
